content:
✨ android-tv-debloat-toolkit | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To debloat, customize, and improve the performance of Android TV devices by removing unwanted applications and system services.
✨ Key Features: • Connect to Android TV over Wi-Fi (ADB Wireless) • Debloat TCL and Google bloatware • Remove Google TV Recommendations • Install APKs remotely • Disable Google Launcher safely
📖 Summary: This Python-based Windows application simplifies the customization of Android TV devices. It allows users to connect via Wi-Fi, debloat unnecessary apps, install custom launchers and APKs, and disable the default Google TV launcher, leading to a cleaner and faster user experience.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
